title: cassia tomentosa var. albida
intro: Cassia tomentosa var. albida, also known as Kutaj or Kutaja, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of the world. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Cassia tomentosa var. albida include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal decoction, powder, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Ayurveda and Unani medicine.
